message:
style: rustfmt line-length normalization across server, db, core, and storage crates

Pure formatting pass — long lines broken to comply with project line-length
limit. Patterns include: multi-argument function calls split to one-arg-per-
line, Paragraph/style chains re-indented, array/slice literals broken across
lines, assert macros reformatted to multi-line, method chains split at dots,
import reordering in test modules.

Also: remove #[cfg(test)] from git_latest_commit_us in cleanup.rs (needed
by non-test call sites).

22 files across mcp-agent-mail-{core,db,server,storage,tools}.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
